translations.en: I need an explanation for that.
translations.fr: J'ai besoin d'une explication pour ça.
translations.it: Ho bisogno di una spiegazione per questo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我需要对这件事的解释。
translations.yue: 我需要一個對呢件事嘅解釋。
translations.ru: Мне нужно объяснение по этому поводу.
translations.pt: Preciso de uma explicação sobre isso.
translations.tr: Bunun için bir açıklamaya ihtiyacım var.
translations.vi: Tôi cần một lời giải thích về việc này.
translations.nl: Ik heb daar uitleg voor nodig.
translations.hi: मुझे इसके लिए एक स्पष्टीकरण चाहिए।
translations.nb: Jeg trenger en forklaring på det.
translations.sv: Jag behöver en förklaring till det.
translations.ro: Am nevoie de o explicație pentru asta.
translations.da: Jeg har brug for en forklaring på det.
translations.ja: それについて説明が必要です。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the sentence.
Finite main verb in present, 1st person singular; selects a direct object ('eine Erklärung').
Indefinite article determiner, feminine accusative singular; modifies 'Erklärung'.
Common noun, feminine accusative singular; direct object of 'brauche'.
Pronominal adverb; adverbial modifier meaning 'regarding/for that (matter)'.

sentences.target: Die Erklärung liegt schon auf dem Tisch.
sentences.reading: /diː ɛɐ̯ˈklɛːʁʊŋ liːkt ʃoːn aʊ̯f deːm tɪʃ/

translations.de: Die Erklärung liegt schon auf dem Tisch.
translations.ipa: /diː ɛɐ̯ˈklɛːʁʊŋ liːkt ʃoːn aʊ̯f deːm tɪʃ/
translations.en: The explanation is already on the table.
translations.es: La explicación ya está sobre la mesa.
translations.fr: L'explication est déjà sur la table.
translations.it: La spiegazione è già sul tavolo.
translations.pt: A explicação já está em cima da mesa.
translations.vi: Bản giải thích đã đặt sẵn trên bàn.
translations.nl: De uitleg ligt al op tafel.
translations.hu: A magyarázat már az asztalon van.
translations.hi: स्पष्टीकरण पहले से मेज़ पर पड़ा है।
translations.el: Η εξήγηση είναι ήδη πάνω στο τραπέζι.
translations.id: Penjelasannya sudah ada di atas meja.
translations.ja: 説明はもうテーブルの上にあります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article determiner, feminine nominative singular; modifies 'Erklärung'.
Common noun, feminine nominative singular; subject of 'liegt'.
Finite main verb in present, 3rd person singular; intransitive predicate.
Adverb of time; modifies 'liegt'.
Preposition 'on', governing the dative here; introduces the prepositional phrase.
Definite article, dative masculine singular; modifies 'Tisch'.
Common noun, masculine dative singular; object of the preposition 'auf'.

sentences.target: Sie wartet auf eine Erklärung von ihm.
sentences.reading: /ziː ˈvaʁtət aʊ̯f ˈaɪ̯nə ɛɐ̯ˈklɛːʁʊŋ fɔn iːm/

translations.de: Sie wartet auf eine Erklärung von ihm.
translations.ipa: /ziː ˈvaʁtət aʊ̯f ˈaɪ̯nə ɛɐ̯ˈklɛːʁʊŋ fɔn iːm/
translations.en: She is waiting for an explanation from him.
translations.es: Ella espera una explicación de él.
translations.fr: Elle attend une explication de sa part.
translations.it: Sta aspettando una spiegazione da lui.
translations.pt: Ela está esperando uma explicação dele.
translations.vi: Cô ấy đang đợi lời giải thích từ anh ấy.
translations.nl: Ze wacht op een uitleg van hem.
translations.hi: वह उससे एक स्पष्टीकरण का इंतज़ार कर रही है।
translations.pl: Ona czeka na wyjaśnienie od niego.
translations.nb: Hun venter på en forklaring fra ham.
translations.sv: Hon väntar på en förklaring från honom.
translations.ro: Ea așteaptă o explicație de la el.
translations.da: Hun venter på en forklaring fra ham.
translations.ja: 彼女は彼からの説明を待っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, nominative; subject of 'wartet' (can mean 'she/they/You-formal' depending on context).
Finite main verb in present, 3rd person singular; takes a prepositional object with 'auf' + accusative.
Preposition selecting accusative with 'warten'; introduces the PP 'auf eine Erklärung'.
Indefinite article determiner, feminine accusative singular; modifies 'Erklärung' within the PP.
Common noun, feminine accusative singular; object of the preposition 'auf'.
Preposition 'from/by', governing the dative; introduces the PP 'von ihm'.
Personal pronoun, 3rd person masculine dative singular; object of 'von'.

sentences.target: Er hat mir keine Erklärung gegeben.

translations.de: Er hat mir keine Erklärung gegeben.
translations.en: He didn't give me an explanation.
translations.es: Él no me dio ninguna explicación.
translations.fr: Il ne m'a donné aucune explication.
translations.it: Non mi ha dato nessuna spiegazione.
translations.ko: 그는 나에게 아무 설명도 해주지 않았어요.
translations.ru: Он не дал мне никаких объяснений.
translations.pt: Ele não me deu nenhuma explicação.
translations.he: הוא לא נתן לי שום הסבר.
translations.vi: Anh ấy không giải thích gì cho tôi.
translations.uk: Він не дав мені жодного пояснення.
translations.hi: उसने मुझे कोई स्पष्टीकरण नहीं दिया।
translations.id: Dia tidak memberi saya penjelasan apa pun.
translations.fi: Hän ei antanut minulle mitään selitystä.
translations.ja: 彼は私に何の説明もしてくれませんでした。
